parser_claim: Cantonese has ordinary predicate A-not-A questions with overt A + 唔 + A and an optional following complement.

forbidden_inference: Do not infer unrestricted productivity for every verb-like token or every complement profile.

parser_claim: Cantonese has ordinary predicate A-not-A questions with overt A + 唔 + A and an optional following complement.

parser_claim: The ordinary Cantonese A-not-A negator is 唔 m4; literary 不 bat1 is not an interchangeable runtime negator for this construction.

forbidden_inference: Do not infer that 不 never occurs anywhere in Cantonese or that all uses of 唔 are A-not-A.

parser_claim: Cantonese 有冇 + VP is recognized in the literature as an A-not-A polar-question form, but it is morphologically suppletive rather than exact A唔A copying.

forbidden_inference: Do not infer that every 有冇 sequence has an event-occurrence VP complement or the same semantics.

parser_claim: Cantonese 有冇 + VP is recognized in the literature as an A-not-A polar-question form, but it is morphologically suppletive rather than exact A唔A copying.
